pr.title: TrigramHash + XSA + TTT on thwu1 SOTA stack - val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Combines trigram hashed embeddings, final-layer exclusive self-attention, and validation-only test-time SGD on frozen layers to boost the thwu1 stack.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT runs SGD on validation tokens before evaluation, finetuning the model on the val shard with bottom layers frozen.
techniques: Exclusive Self-Attention in the last four layers
Test-time training via SGD on validation tokens with frozen lower layers
